allow: Bash(mkdir -p src/app src/components src/lib src/hooks src/types && mkdir -p src/app/\\\(auth\\\)/sign-in/\\[\\[...sign-in\\]\\] && mkdir -p "src/app/\(app\)/dashboard" "src/app/\(app\)/restaurants/new" "src/app/\(app\)/restaurants/[id]" "src/app/\(app\)/pipeline" "src/app/\(app\)/visits/new" "src/app/\(app\)/visits/[id]" "src/app/\(app\)/calendar" "src/app/\(app\)/meetings/new" "src/app/\(app\)/meetings/[id]" "src/app/\(app\)/tasks/new" "src/app/\(app\)/warm-leads/new" "src/app/\(app\)/warm-leads/[id]" "src/app/\(app\)/map" "src/app/\(app\)/reports/pipeline" "src/app/\(app\)/reports/visits" "src/app/\(app\)/reports/reps" "src/app/\(app\)/admin/users" "src/app/\(app\)/admin/territories" "src/app/\(app\)/admin/settings" "src/app/\(app\)/profile" && mkdir -p src/components/layout src/components/dashboard "src/components/restaurants/RestaurantProfile" src/components/visits "src/components/warm-leads" src/components/tasks src/components/pipeline src/components/ui && mkdir -p src/lib/api src/lib/services src/lib/validations src/lib/utils && echo "done")
